modernization_workflow.overview:
This workflow guides the complete modernization of a legacy Java application (Struts 1.x, JSP, Servlets, JDBC, SQLite) to a modern, cloud-native Spring Boot application with PostgreSQL, containerization, and Helm-based deployment.
This is NOT a rewrite-from-scratch project. The goal is working modernization with full functional parity.

constraint.rule: Maintain 100% functional parity with legacy application
constraint.rationale: This is a modernization, not a feature enhancement project
PostgreSQL must use emptyDir volumes only (ephemeral storage acceptable for demo)

constraint.rule: All Kubernetes manifests must be Helm-templated
constraint.rationale: No standalone YAML files - everything goes through Helm

phase_1_analysis.title: Legacy Application Analysis
phase_1_analysis.description: Thoroughly understand the existing application before making any changes

step.action: Identify and catalog all legacy components

tools.tool: search_files - Find Struts configs, JSPs, Servlets

deliverables.item: List of all Struts actions and their mappings
Inventory of JSP pages and their purposes

step.details: Analyze the SQLite database to understand: - Table structures and relationships - Data types and constraints - Sample data for testing - Foreign key relationships

step.action: Map legacy features to modern equivalents

phase_2_architecture_design.title: Modern Architecture Design
phase_2_architecture_design.description: Design the target Spring Boot architecture before implementation

step.mandatory_structure: abc-bank/ ├── backend/ │ ├── src/main/java/com/abcbank/ │ │ ├── controller/ # REST controllers or MVC controllers │ │ ├── service/ # Business logic layer │ │ ├── repository/ # Spring Data JPA repositories │ │ ├── model/ # JPA entities │ │ ├── dto/ # Data Transfer Objects │ │ ├── config/ # Spring configuration classes │ │ └── exception/ # Exception handling │ ├── src/main/resources/ │ │ ├── application.yml # Spring Boot configuration │ │ ├── data.sql # Seed data for demo │ │ └── templates/ # Thymeleaf templates (if used) │ ├── pom.xml │ └── Dockerfile ├── frontend/ # Only if React/Next.js option chosen │ ├── src/ │ ├── package.json │ └── Dockerfile ├── helm/ │ └── abc-bank/ │ ├── Chart.yaml │ ├── values.yaml │ └── templates/ │ ├── _helpers.tpl │ ├── secrets.yaml │ ├── app-deployment.yaml │ ├── app-service.yaml │ ├── postgres-deployment.yaml │ ├── postgres-service.yaml │ └── route.yaml └── README.md

option.name: thymeleaf
option.pros: - Simpler deployment (single container) - Server-side rendering - Easier to maintain - Better for enterprise banking UI

option.name: react_spa
option.pros: - Modern, interactive UI - Better user experience - Clearer separation of concerns
option.cons: - More complex deployment - Requires separate container - More development effort

step.decision_criteria: Ask user which approach they prefer, or default to Thymeleaf for simplicity

guidelines.guideline: Map SQLite types to PostgreSQL types
Create JPA entity classes with proper annotations

phase_3_implementation.title: Spring Boot Implementation
phase_3_implementation.description: Build the modern application following Spring Boot best practices

tasks.task: Create pom.xml with all required dependencies
Set up main application class with @SpringBootApplication
Create package structure (controller, service, repository, model, dto, config)

requirements.requirement: Create entity classes for all database tables

step.action: Implement service layer with business logic

requirements.requirement: Use DTOs for data transfer (don't expose entities)
Configure form login or HTTP Basic authentication

step.configuration:
# application.yml management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info endpoint: health: show-details: when-authorized info: env: enabled: true
info: app: name: ABC Bank description: Modernized Banking Application version: 2.0.0

requirements.requirement: Insert demo users with BCrypt hashed passwords

phase_4_containerization.title: Docker Containerization
phase_4_containerization.description: Create Docker images for the application

step.action: Create Dockerfile for Spring Boot application
step.dockerfile_template:
# Multi-stage build for Spring Boot FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml . COPY src ./src RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-alpine WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar app.jar
# Create non-root user RUN addgroup -S spring && adduser -S spring -G spring USER spring:spring
EXPOSE 8080
# Health check HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \ CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || exit 1
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

# Multi-stage build for React FROM node:18-alpine AS build WORKDIR /app COPY package*.json ./ RUN npm ci COPY . . RUN npm run build
FROM nginx:alpine COPY --from=build /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf EXPOSE 80 CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

step.note: Images should be built locally. Do NOT use oc new-build or BuildConfigs.

phase_5_helm_charts.title: Helm Chart Creation
phase_5_helm_charts.description: Create comprehensive Helm charts for Kubernetes/OpenShift deployment

step.template: apiVersion: v2 name: abc-bank description: Modernized ABC Bank Application type: application version: 1.0.0 appVersion: "2.0.0" keywords: - banking - spring-boot - postgresql maintainers: - name: ABC Bank Team email: team@abcbank.com

# Application configuration app: name: abc-bank replicaCount: 1 image: repository: abc-bank-backend tag: latest pullPolicy: IfNotPresent service: type: ClusterIP port: 8080 resources: limits: cpu: 500m memory: 512Mi requests: cpu: 250m memory: 256Mi livenessProbe: httpGet: path: /actuator/health/liveness port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 60 periodSeconds: 10 readinessProbe: httpGet: path: /actuator/health/readiness port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 30 periodSeconds: 5
# PostgreSQL configuration postgresql: enabled: true image: repository: postgres tag: "15-alpine" service: type: ClusterIP port: 5432 resources: limits: cpu: 500m memory: 512Mi requests: cpu: 250m memory: 256Mi # CRITICAL: Use emptyDir only (no PVCs) persistence: enabled: false volumeMount: name: postgres-data mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
# Database credentials (will be stored in secrets) database: name: abcbank username: abcbank password: changeme123
# OpenShift Route configuration route: enabled: true host: abc-bank.apps.example.com tls: enabled: true termination: edge insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy: Redirect

step.critical_note: MUST use emptyDir volume, NOT PersistentVolumeClaim
step.template: apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-postgres labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database spec: replicas: 1 selector: matchLabels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database template: metadata: labels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database spec: containers: - name: postgresql image: "{{ .Values.postgresql.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.postgresql.image.tag }}" ports: - containerPort: 5432 name: postgresql env: - name: POSTGRES_DB valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-name - name: POSTGRES_USER valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-user - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-password - name: PGDATA value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata volumeMounts: - name: postgres-data mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data resources: {{- toYaml .Values.postgresql.resources | nindent 10 }} livenessProbe: exec: command: - /bin/sh - -c - pg_isready -U $POSTGRES_USER initialDelaySeconds: 30 periodSeconds: 10 readinessProbe: exec: command: - /bin/sh - -c - pg_isready -U $POSTGRES_USER initialDelaySeconds: 5 periodSeconds: 5 volumes: - name: postgres-data emptyDir: {} # CRITICAL: emptyDir only, no PVC

apiVersion: v1 kind: Service metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-postgres labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database spec: type: {{ .Values.postgresql.service.type }} ports: - port: {{ .Values.postgresql.service.port }} targetPort: postgresql protocol: TCP name: postgresql selector: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database

apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }} labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend spec: replicas: {{ .Values.app.replicaCount }} selector: matchLabels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend template: metadata: labels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend spec: containers: - name: {{ .Chart.Name }} image: "{{ .Values.app.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.app.image.tag }}" imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.app.image.pullPolicy }} ports: - containerPort: {{ .Values.app.service.port }} name: http env: - name: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL value: "jdbc:postgresql://{{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-postgres:5432/{{ .Values.database.name }}" - name: SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-user - name: SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-password - name: SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO value: "update" - name: SPRING_JPA_SHOW_SQL value: "false" resources: {{- toYaml .Values.app.resources | nindent 10 }} livenessProbe: {{- toYaml .Values.app.livenessProbe | nindent 10 }} readinessProbe: {{- toYaml .Values.app.readinessProbe | nindent 10 }}

apiVersion: v1 kind: Service metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }} labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend spec: type: {{ .Values.app.service.type }} ports: - port: {{ .Values.app.service.port }} targetPort: http protocol: TCP name: http selector: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend

phase_6_documentation.title: Documentation and README
phase_6_documentation.description: Create comprehensive documentation for the modernized application

limitations.limitation: PostgreSQL uses emptyDir (ephemeral storage) - data lost on pod restart

phase_7_validation.title: Testing and Validation
phase_7_validation.description: Ensure the modernized application works correctly

validation_checklist.item: PostgreSQL pod starts and is ready
Application pod starts and passes health checks
User can log in with demo credentials

completion_criteria.criterion: All legacy features work identically in modernized version
Code follows Spring Boot best practices
